markets.rules_primary: If Jung Hoo Lee records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the San Francisco vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 18, 2026 at 8:08 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jung Hoo Lee is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jung Hoo Lee starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jung Hoo Lee is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Jung Hoo Lee is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
